crashed-turn.jsonl.note: no result event; recompute -> dead (SPEC §4 crash path). Fault-injected: only the harness-spawned turn_pid was killed.

idle-mail-stopdrain.jsonl.note: message arrived post-drain; status flagged idle+mail; next launch's composed prompt drains it (compose_prompt verified)

respawn-continuity.jsonl.note: new session_id, rotated log, cost_baseline = pre-rotation spend

send-midturn-injection.jsonl.note: mailbox seeded pre-first-tool-boundary; <MANAGER MESSAGE> delivered mid-turn via PostToolUse hook

smoke-core-spawn-result.jsonl.note: baseline healthy completed turn; result event present, hook/system lines land after it (SMOKE-A shape)

stopblock-seeded-early.jsonl.note: mailbox seeded before a no-tool turn; Stop hook blocks + queued instruction executed same turn
